title: SPP VER Curtailments By BAA JSON API
description:
VER curtailment data in 5 minute intervals for SPP by BAA, SPP East (SPP) and SPP West (SWPW). For SPP East, the data begins on March 30th, 2026, while SWPW begins on April 1st, 2026.

For SPP-wide and historical VER curtailment data, see the `spp_ver_curtailments` [dataset](https://www.gridstatus.io/datasets/spp_ver_curtailments).


This data is total VER curtailment (not per resource).
